description_long: This is a rectangular, wall-mounted cabinet or shelf unit with a light wood finish and a single hinged door. The door is attached on the right side and features a metallic handle, allowing access to the interior compartment. The cabinet has a simple, modern design with clean lines and a smooth surface, and the wood grain is visible across all exterior panels. The top and bottom panels are solid, while the left side is open, providing a shelf-like space for storage or display. The hinges and handle are metallic, adding a subtle contrast to the wood texture. The interior appears hollow, suitable for storing various items in an urban or residential setting.
description: A light wood, wall-mounted cabinet with a single hinged door and metallic handle, featuring an open left side for shelf storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door, metallic handle, and visible interior compartment.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the detached door and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back panel and the open left side.
description_view_3: Left side view with the door fully open and the open shelf area visible.
